title: Pivot Board View (monday app) not loading on larger board

posts.author: mclaughlin5360 (Mitch McLaughlin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I have used the Pivot board many times before without any issues. I recently tried adding it to one of my other boards that has a lot of data within it and the pivot board view loads indefinitely. I tried again adding it to another board and that time it worked just fine.

Any ideas on limitations within the pivot board view? Maybe too many items in a board?

Capture1614×696 19.3 KB
